name: American Studies, Bachelor of Arts

requirements.heading: Preparatory Subject Matter
notes: One additional lower division American Studies course.
Or an equivalent course in racial and ethnic diversity.
Or an equivalent course in social science approaches to culture.
Or an equivalent course introducing critical approaches to literary and visual texts in the humanities.

requirements.heading: Emphasis
notes: Three additional upper division American Studies courses.

advising_notes: Global Education & Study Abroad: Majors are encouraged to study abroad or engage in domestic opportunities off-campus; such as the UC Washington Program, internships, and many other opportunities. Major requirements can be fulfilled with up to eight units from study abroad or other domestic off-campus opportunities with the permission of the undergraduate advisor.
